rules.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl+ font-light tracking-tighter leading-none text-white
rules.overline: text-xs md:text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-gold-500 font-semibold

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing, Optical Alignment, Asymmetry for impact.

grids.destinations: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 md:gap-12 (Mode A: The Tetris Grid)
grids.dashboards: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 (Mode B: The Control Room Grid)

hero.layout: Full-screen width (100vh), cinematic video/image background with 'bg-black/40' overlay.
hero.content: Centered elegant typography, staggered entrance animation.
hero.interactive: Flight search widget overlaps the bottom of the hero by -100px.

flight_search_widget.style: Crystal Glassmorphism resting on the horizon line.
flight_search_widget.layout: Horizontal bar on desktop, stacked on mobile. Uses custom Shadcn Select/Popover without standard Vercel look.
flight_search_widget.interaction: Hover states must lighten the border slightly. Inputs should feel seamless without harsh borders.

destinations_grid.style: Bento Grid (Tetris). Mix large spans (col-span-8 row-span-2) with tall narrow cards.
destinations_grid.overlay: Gradient overlay from bottom to top: bg-gradient-to-t from-black/90 via-black/30 to-transparent.
destinations_grid.hover: Image scales up (scale-105) slowly, text slides up slightly.

ticket_boarding_pass.inspiration: Scribd best practices. Clean 12-column grid layout, F-Pattern scanning.
ticket_boarding_pass.style: Light surface (#F8F9FA) over dark background to make it pop like a real physical ticket.
ticket_boarding_pass.features: Perforated edges using CSS radial-gradient masks, clear hierarchy separating flight times, passenger info, and large QR code.

seat_selection_map.style: Aircraft fuselage silhouette container. Seats are subtle interactive rounded rectangles.

portals_dashboards.style: Dense but luxurious. Sidebar navigation with subtle active state highlights (gold left border).
portals_dashboards.charts: Recharts with dark theme axes, gold and white data lines.
portals_dashboards.cards: Flat background with 1px subtle white/5 border. Minimal shadows.

motion_and_interactions.scrolling: Lenis smooth scrolling is mandatory for momentum and weight.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Framer Motion fade and slight slide-up (y: 20 -> 0) on page load.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements MUST have hover states (e.g., buttons transition to lighter gold).
motion_and_interactions.parallax: Subtle parallax on hero background and destination images.

testing.data_testid_rule: All interactive elements, inputs, buttons, and major sections MUST include 'data-testid' attributes in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Outfit' fonts are imported and configured in Tailwind.
Do NOT use pure black or gray; always tint to Midnight Blue/Navy (#0B132B).
Use Phosphor icons. Wrap major views in framer-motion stagger elements.
For the ticket UI, do not just render a generic card. Use a light background for the ticket over the dark app background to make it look like a physical artifact.
Never use placehold.it or similar. Strictly use the provided Unsplash/Pexels URLs.
Ensure to implement Lenis for smooth scrolling.
